[189:21]He was never saying that for the sake of the voters.

[189:23]It was never for the voters.

[189:24]It was for the donors and understand something.

[189:29]When a politician promises a donor one thing and promises the voters another thing, he's

[189:35]always lying to the voters.

[189:38]And the reason is because the donors are the people that they're going to rely on in two

[189:44]years. When the president needs the donors to pull through in the midterms to support

[189:49]their majority in the Congress, they call the donors. When the president needs favorable

[189:57]coverage in the media, he calls the donors.
